[DQC.US.0169.10102] The parenthetical network 9952157 - Statement - Consolidated Statements of Cash Flows (Parenthetical) contains calculations. The calculation uses the following concepts: www.aercap.com:AmortizationOfMaintenanceRightsExpense, www.aercap.com:MaintenanceRightsIntangibleMaintenanceReservedContractRightsExpenseOffsetByMaintenanceLiabilityRelease, www.aercap.com:MaintenanceRightsIntangibleEndOfLeaseContractCashReceipt, www.aercap.com:MaintenanceRightsIntangibleEndOfLeaseContractMaintenanceRightsExpense, www.aercap.com:NetEOLAndMRContractMaintenanceRightsReAllocatedRelatedToTheUkraineConflict
These monetary concepts should not be defined in the parenthetical section of the filing and should be included in the statement calculation.
